nasb.text: Just as we obeyed Moses in all things, so we will obey you; only may the Lord your God be with you as He was with Moses.

esv.text: Just as we obeyed Moses in all things, so we will obey you. Only may the Lord your God be with you, as he was with Moses!

cnv.text: 我們從前怎樣凡事聽從摩西，現在也必照樣聽從你；唯願耶和華你的　神與你同在，像與摩西同在一樣。

ccb.text: 我们在一切的事上怎样服从摩西，也必照样服从你，愿你的上帝耶和华与你同在，像与摩西同在一样。
